Regions Artists Timeline All works

Paolo Veronese

4 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
The Wedding at Cana
by Paolo Veronese
Venetian Renaissance · 1563 · Louvre, Paris
The largest painting in the Louvre at seventy square meters. Painted for a Venetian refectory; Napoleon's troops cut it in half in 1797 to ship it to France.
Various Sketches of the Madonna and Child (recto); Architectural Studies (verso) [partially visible on recto]
by Paolo Veronese
Italy, Venice · c. 1570 · pen and brown ink (iron gall) and brush and brown wash
Portrait of Agostino Barbarigo
by Paolo Veronese
Italy, Venice · after c. 1571 · oil on canvas
Various Sketches of the Madonna and Child (recto)
by Paolo Veronese
Italy, Venice · c. 1580 · pen and brown ink (iron gall) and brush and brown wash
←Italian, Veronese Possibly after Paolo Caliari, called Paolo Veronese→
